description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.3 Docker image and a before_script that runs 'bundle install' and 'npm install'. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs 'bundle exec jekyll build -d test' then 'bundle exec jekyll build && bundle exec htmlproofer --log-level :debug ./_site/ --assume_extension --http_status_ignore 503 --url-ignore "/www.linkedin.com/,/localhost/"', stores the 'test' directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except master. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs 'bundle exec jekyll build -d public' and 'bundle exec jekyll algolia', publishes the 'public' directory as a pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch. Set variables ALGOLIA_API_KEY, JEKYLL_ENV=production, and LC_ALL=C.UTF-8.
